useful_deltas.summary: Added a canonical Apple Newsroom release parser and exact bounded cross-check that independently corroborates 40 AAPL Nasdaq archive events on announcement date, nominal amount, and matched-release common-stock wording while preserving ex-date and whole-provider limits.

critic_findings.finding: Security identity is proved by explicit issuer wording only for parsed matched releases, not by a complete Nasdaq preferred-security row audit.
critic_findings.rationale: Rejected as a remaining overclaim: code, live JSON, doctrine, readiness, and wake reports qualify security_identity only inside the 40 matched-release interval and explicitly deny whole-provider or older-row security-class proof.

critic_findings.finding: The 40/40 result is intersection completeness inside the issuer-sitemap span; both sources could silently omit the same event.
critic_findings.rationale: Rejected as a remaining completeness overclaim: all durable surfaces call the result bounded partial corroboration and deny whole-provider completeness; dual silent omission remains an explicit residual limit.

critic_findings.finding: An archive ex_date equal to an issuer record_date should still remain unqualified.
critic_findings.rationale: A dedicated negative control now constructs equal record/ex dates and proves partial corroboration still excludes ex_date from qualified_fields.

critic_findings.finding: reports/readiness/LATEST.md still pointed to the completed 1835 issuer-cross-check seed.
critic_findings.rationale: Rejected as a remaining defect after finalization: readiness now records the 2237 finalizer outcome, marks 1835 superseded, and carries exactly the merged explicitly-labeled-ex-date source-or-close seed.

critic_findings.finding: The full suite was executor-reported but not challenger-reverified.
critic_findings.rationale: Rejected as an outstanding gate after finalization: the finalizer reran the focused suite at 36/36, platform smoke, the live exact 40/40 cross-check, and the full suite at 166/166, all green.

data_dependencies: One genuinely independent source that explicitly labels historical AAPL ex-dividend dates is required to corroborate ex_date for the bounded 40-event interval; issuer record dates cannot substitute.
Split-adjusted amount/spot qualification remains required before deep-history assignment counts can be calibrated.
Observed historical option surfaces remain required for evidence above L0.
Forward TSLL option archive remains one of three required distinct New York market dates for replay plumbing.
next: Inventory one no-paid source that explicitly labels historical AAPL ex-dividend dates for the same 40-event interval; corroborate only an independent ex_date-equivalent field, never issuer record date or Nasdaq reuse. If none survives a short fail-closed inventory, close this provenance route at bounded partial L0 and redirect to an open historical-underlying or simulator-capability loop; do not reopen closed daily-bar proxy families or promote, paper, shadow, arm, or live.
